title: Odontochilus moulmeinensis
taxonomy: Odontochilus moulmeinensis is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This species is further grouped under the subfamily Orchidoideae. It belongs to the tribe Orchideae and the genus Odontochilus. The classification of Odontochilus moulmeinensis is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic analysis. By studying its classification, researchers can gain insights into the evolutionary history of this plant species.
